required_static_art_package: E:\参考图\麻将\项目\00_提交给程序_最终资源\静态美术主包_PNG_必须接入
selection_policy: Use TidyCocos assets only for this V2 package.
Prefer warm material fragments, neutral light, and restrained feedback.
Avoid block/candy/rainbow/football effects that conflict with the African totem tile skin.
Keep this package optional; do not block P0 PNG integration.

effects.recommended_use: Primary tile elimination candidate. Play once at matched tile centers or between the two matched tiles.
effects.visual_fit: Best fit in this package. Warm wood fragments match the totem/wood/gold/ivory direction.
effects.risk: Low-medium. Needs scale tuning so fragments do not cover too much of the board.

effects.recommended_use: Victory modal or final-clear light accent. Use appear once, idle only if it remains subtle.
effects.visual_fit: Good. Neutral white light and star shapes have low style conflict.

effects.recommended_use: Subtle background glow/smoke behind the victory panel or final-clear moment.
effects.visual_fit: Good. Mostly neutral light and smoke, not theme-specific.
effects.risk: Low-medium. Animation name differs from file name; use manifest animation name.

effects.visual_fit: Medium. Celebration is useful, but colors are brighter and less aligned than P0 assets.

effects.recommended_use: Optional combo feedback, not normal tile elimination.
effects.visual_fit: Medium-low. Purple light and wing/star shapes may need opacity tuning.

effects.risk: Low-medium. Only useful if tutorial guidance exists.

reference_only.notes: Included only as a visual and parameter reference for recreating a light particle effect in H5.

excluded_after_review.reason: Too colorful/rainbow/block-like for the current totem style.
Too close to block-game dissolve effect.
White glass/ice fragments do not fit the warm totem tile material as well as box_broken.
Contains football and green block style; direct style mismatch.
